title: Duzzit Bathroom Wipes - Cleans & Shines | 100% Biodegradable - Made From Plant Fibres | Suitable for Baths, Sinks, Toilets & Showers (60 Biodegradable Wipes, Fresh Burst)
features: EFFECTIVE BATHROOM CLEANER: These bathroom wipes cut through soap scum, toothpaste marks and water stains with ease. Ideal for keeping baths and sinks spotless after everyday use, they leave a sparkle and shine with no need for sprays or cloths.

PLANT-BASED & BIODEGRADABLE: Made from plant fibres, these 100% biodegradable cleaning wipes are a more eco-conscious choice. They offer the strength needed to scrub bathroom surfaces while helping reduce waste in everyday cleaning routines.

MULTI-SURFACE CLEANING POWER: Designed to be used across multiple surfaces, these surface wipes are suitable for baths, basins, toilet seats, tiled walls and shower doors. A simple swipe keeps your bathroom looking fresh and clean every day.

FRESH BURST SCENT: Enjoy a pleasant fresh burst fragrance every time you clean. These bathroom wipes leave behind a light, uplifting scent, making them perfect for freshening up guest bathrooms, en-suites or shared washrooms.

READY TO USE & NO MESS: With no need for sprays, cloths or buckets, these cleaning wipes offer a fast, fuss-free clean. Great for everyday spills, post-shower wipe downs or tackling quick messes before guests arrive.

CONVENIENT RESEALABLE PACK: The 60-wipe pack comes in a resealable pouch to lock in moisture and keep wipes fresh. Ideal for storing under the sink, in bathroom drawers or in cleaning caddies for easy grab-and-go access.

SHOWER & TILE CLEANER: These wipes work brilliantly as a shower cleaner or tile cleaner, removing limescale streaks and water residue with just a few swipes. Great for cleaning glass doors, tiled walls and chrome fixtures.

GENTLE ON SKIN, TOUGH ON GRIME: The formula is tough on dirt but gentle enough for daily use. Whether wiping down around the toilet or freshening up the sink, these toilet wipes clean effectively without irritating hands.

PERFECT FOR SMALL SPACES: Ideal for small bathrooms, caravans or rented flats, these compact cleaning wipes make cleaning easier without taking up too much space. Keep a pack on hand for quick, everyday maintenance.

MUST-HAVE CLEANING SUPPLIES: Whether restocking cleaning products or building a starter kit, these surface wipes are an essential. Use them as a toilet cleaner, a shower cleaner or a quick wipe-down for tiles, taps and counters.
description: Product Description Keep your bathroom sparkling clean with Duzzit Biodegradable Bathroom Wipes. Designed for quick and effective cleaning, these eco-friendly surface wipes are made from plant fibres and deliver a powerful shine to baths, sinks, toilets, showers and tiles. Each wipe is strong, fresh-scented and ready to tackle everyday grime, soap scum, and water marks without leaving streaks behind. Ideal for busy homes, shared spaces, or quick touch-ups before guests arrive, these wipes are a must-have in any collection of cleaning supplies. With a convenient resealable pack and a kind-to-skin formula, they make every clean-up job easier and more pleasant. From daily maintenance to deep cleans, these biodegradable bathroom wipes bring together the power of a reliable bathroom cleaner with the ease of disposable surface wipes – all in one handy pack. Ingredients Contains amongst other ingredients: <5% Non Ionic Surfactants, Perfume, Methylisothiazolinone, Benzisothiazolinone. Directions * Peel back resealable label on the front of pack * Remove wipes as required * Wipe across surface and leave to dry. * Carefully reseal pack after use to prevent wipes from drying out.
